name: Update eco news with valid data -- @1.3
fullName: Update Eco News: Update eco news with valid data

steps.name: Given I am an authorized user
When I send PUT request to update eco news with id "78" and payload:
Then the response status code should 200
And the response should match schema eco_news

parameters.name: data
parameters.value: {"id":"78","source":"https://example.net","shortInfo":"Upcoming environmental event","tags":["events"],"title":"Upcoming environmental event","content":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Environmental Event","languageCode":"en"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Event details and registration info","languageCode":"en"}}
